## Phone approval checklist
- [ ] Looks right on mobile
- [ ] Copy/tone is on-brand (personal, punchy)
- [ ] No new dependency / infra / auth snuck in (or it's justified above)
- [ ] Auto-review verdict is green (or addressed)
